name: AMERICAN SUPERCONDUCTOR CORP /DE/
summary: American Superconductor Corporation (AMSC), founded in 1987, provides megawatt-scale power resiliency solutions for electric grids, naval fleets, and wind power markets. Key products include HTS superconductor wire (Amperium), D-VAR voltage control systems, PowerModule power converters, degaussing ship protection systems, and wind turbine electrical control systems. AMSC serves utilities, industrial manufacturers, semiconductor fabs, and the U.S. and Royal Canadian Navies, with an estimated $9 billion total addressable market.

products.name: Amperium HTS Wire
products.description: High-temperature superconductor wire made from YBCO compound, conducting more electricity than copper with minimal power loss.

products.name: PowerModule Power Converters
products.description: Proprietary software and hardware power converters used in grid interconnection, voltage control, and wind turbine electrical control systems.

products.name: D-VAR Grid Interconnection System
products.description: Dynamic voltage management solution enabling wind farms and solar plants to meet utility grid code requirements.

products.name: Ship Protection Systems (SPS)
products.description: Advanced degaussing systems using HTS cable coils to reduce naval ships' magnetic signatures for mine protection.

products.name: Sag Mitigation Systems
products.description: Substation-level power conditioning systems protecting semiconductor fabrication plants from voltage sags and swells in sub-cycle timeframes.

products.name: Wind Turbine Electrical Control Systems
products.description: Power electronics and control systems for wind turbines controlling voltage, current, frequency, pitch, and yaw.

products.name: Voltage Compensators and Harmonic Filters
products.description: Power quality solutions for industrial customers including capacitors, transformers, and rectifiers for energy-intensive factories.

products.name: Transmission Planning Services
products.description: Grid planning services identifying power congestion, poor power quality, and network performance improvement opportunities.

products.name: Wind Turbine Designs (Licensing)
products.description: Licensed highly engineered wind turbine designs covering drive trains and power ratings of 2 MW and higher.

partnerships.description: Supplier of advanced degaussing ship protection systems to upgrade in-board power systems and fleet electrification.
Supplier of advanced degaussing systems to reduce naval ships' magnetic signatures for mine protection.
